data_sources.area_calculation: Turf.js geodesic area computation (sq meters → acres)
data_sources.guideline_values: Tamil Nadu Registration Department (tnreginet.gov.in) — Zone-wise guideline values for 2024-25
data_sources.suitability_scoring: Composite score based on: Area (>50 acres), Obstacle Distance (>1km), CRZ compliance (0.5-2km from coast)
data_sources.urban_exclusion: Census 2011 population density + Google Maps urban boundary verification
data_sources.coastline_distance: Turf.js pointToLineDistance against OSM natural=coastline features
data_sources.obstacle_mapping: OSM tags: power=line, man_made=pipeline, waterway=river|canal, railway=rail

disclaimer: Guideline values are government minimums. Actual market price may be 1.5x to 3x higher depending on road access, proximity to SIPCOT zones, and water availability.
